---
title: "Slides"
---

Use this section for presentation-ready outputs connected to the report and labs.

## Available Decks

- [Matching Methods Starter Deck](matching_methods_slides.qmd)

## Suggested Slide Pipeline

1. Keep deck narrative aligned with `matching_methods_report.qmd`.
2. Pull one worked example at a time from the labs section.
3. Export speaker-ready slides from Quarto RevealJS.
